Pilihan ukiran relief kayu Jati terbaik: A selection of the finest teak wood relief carvings, hand-carved by Jepara artists, ready to adorn your walls.
Daftar mahakarya Jepara yang telah Anda: List of Jepara masterpieces you have purchased.
Anda belum melakukan pembelian karya sen: You haven't purchased any artwork yet. Please explore our gallery.
Kelola data produk, seniman, dan pantau: Manage product data, artists, and monitor stock.
Pastikan keaslian dan legalitas karya se: Ensure the authenticity and legality of your Jepara wood carvings by tracking the registered SVLK certificate number in our database.
Jepara Wood-Trace dilahirkan secara kola: Jepara Wood-Trace was born collaboratively to preserve the noble tradition of wood carving from Senenan Village, Jepara Regency, Central Java. Amidst the onslaught of pattern-forming machines and mass fabrication reproduction from abroad, we are here to give a special stage to the beauty of original works and the originality of local Carving Artists.
Setiap goresan tatah yang membuang serat: Every chisel stroke that removes wood fibers has a long story about the struggle for cultural preservation. And every story deserves to be documented and verified strictly. Through the WebXR (Augmented Reality) technology we embed, as well as the support for tracking transparency of SVLK (Wood Legality Verification System) forwarded to the international realm, art collectors from all over the virtual universe can now present authentic carved works from Jepara stunningly exactly the size of their real space, and then transact to buy them honestly, legally, safely, and fairly directly into the hands of the artists.
Seorang master pengukir dedikatif dari D: A dedicated master carver from Desa Senenan, passing down generations of traditional woodworking techniques.
Seniman ukir master dengan pengalaman le: Master carving artist with over 40 years of experience in traditional Jepara 3D relief carving techniques. Focuses on ancient epic motifs and Nusantara flora.
Studio ukir modern yang menggabungkan pr: A modern carving studio that combines advanced CNC machine precision with a final hand-carved touch for extraordinary detail.
